data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for cost tracking per mailing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Cost tracking per mailing' as outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions this requirement but does not provide any supporting evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of cost tracking per mailing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the cost tracking per mailing requirement.
